description: Product Description This is a 20CM disco party mirror ball. Ideal for Photography props, Djs, bands, pubs, weddings, banquets, night clubs, discos or other occasion/ place. Easy to hang it on the wall or ceiling (Do not included hook, rotary motor or light effect). Hanging ring on top of the ball secures the disco ball. The hanging mirror ball is the ultimate addition to any disco themed party or to just add a pretty light show to your home. Covered with tiny mirrored squares in retro styling. It has a secure loop for easy hanging. NOTE: Since the mirror ball is made up by many small glass. During the air mail transportation,maybe some of them will fall off. If you found the package damaged or product damaged, please contact us for exchange or replacement.We will serve you the best service. Hereby Declare: The glass sheet of the mirror ball is glued on with double-sided adhesive. Because the two poles are getting smaller and smaller, the glass sheet is definitely not as dense as the equator area. The glass sheet is spirally turned and pasted, so there are some areas with white foam exposed. There is no enough space to insert another piece of glass, we are sure you will understand when you see and think about it. When hanging out to make the effect, the line of sight is mainly concentrated on the equator, so the two poles do not affect the effect at all. Package included: 1PC Glass Rotating Mirror Ball ( Don't included Motor and the Lamps ) Mirror Product Size: Diameter 20cm/8inch Product Weight: 0.6kg/1.4lbsProduct material: Inferier: glass; Inner: Foam Safety Warning Be careful when handling as glass fragments are included.
